rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.206, which addresses the Housing Trust Fund's exemption from the Texas Trust Code. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The housing trust fund provided for by this subchapter is not subject to Subtitle B, Title 9, Property Code.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns Housing Trust Fund and Property Code trust provisions, not property tax homestead exemptions.
